about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of how systems — human and artificial — actually work. From architecting agentic AI platforms that transformed enterprise performance, to studying how conversational interfaces shape decision-making at scale, my mind is relentlessly pursuing what is next. The complexity of problems is not a deterrent; it is the invitation.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it is my ability to translate strategic ambiguity into clear, human-centered service experiences — and to bring cross-functional teams along on that journey — that defines how I create lasting value.
about.quote.text: Exceptional GenAI experiences are not built on technology alone — they are built on the clarity of human intent meeting the precision of agentic design.
about.title: Strategic service designer at the frontier of human-AI experience
about.value.0.desc: Every service design engagement begins with relentless curiosity about the real problem — not the stated one. Deep research, behavioral analysis, and opportunity identification before a single interaction is designed.
about.value.0.title: Research-first
about.value.1.desc: Service blueprints, journey maps, and agentic interaction patterns are only as strong as the precision of their logic. The smallest design decision either builds or erodes enterprise trust.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Influencing senior leadership, aligning cross-functional partners, and articulating complex GenAI design principles in understandable language is not a soft skill — it is the strategic capability that ships enterprise solutions.
about.value.2.title: Strategic communicator
about.value.3.desc: Design that does not move business metrics is not finished. Every service design decision is traceable to an outcome — operating margin, task completion, retention, or velocity.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of delivery, insights generated by the agentic AI platform directly informed enterprise-wide service strategy, targeted engagement initiatives, and conversational customer interactions that reversed a negative financial trajectory. The organization moved from a –17% operating margin to +2%, achieved measurable improvements in customer retention and subscription renewals, and reduced friction across the member acquisition journey — demonstrating how thoughtfully architected GenAI experiences, grounded in rigorous service design principles and behavioral research, can drive measurable enterprise transformation.

modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals driven by actionable, real-time behavioral and psychological insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average order value and customer lifetime value through conversational AI-informed engagement strategy.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced enterprise customer acquisition friction by proactively surfacing intent-matched service responses and personalized onboarding pathways.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled GenAI design capability across ~40 enterprise users spanning sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An enterprise agentic AI platform architected on live business intelligence data — combining behavioral, demographic, and psychological research to enable human-agent collaboration at scale. The system delivered conversational AI experiences and multi-modal interfaces that empowered teams to understand not just who customers were, but how and why they made decisions — enabling proactive, personalized, and data-driven service interactions across all touchpoints.

modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive enterprise design system to modernize a fragmented web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable governance system improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed — aligning all design decisions with measurable enterprise business outcomes and service design principles.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Labor Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established enterprise-wide consistent service design patterns, eliminating inconsistencies between designers, teams, and digital touchpoints.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Created a shared source of truth in Figma — referenced directly in Contentful — clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations across the design lifecycle.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Aligned service design strategy with enterprise business goals by embedding design intent and governance directly into system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Built GenAI design capability and autonomy in junior and mid-level designers through repeatable, well-documented patterns and structured mentorship.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by delivering visible, consistent design governance standards referenced across all enterprise deliverables.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the enterprise design system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a single source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design governance, and team capability — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic enterprise discipline aligned to business value.

modal.project.2.challenge: Leading the service design strategy and end-to-end experience architecture for a complex enterprise membership join flow. The core service design challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to join in full compliance with regulatory requirements, while ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value of the service offering — removing confusion, friction, and mistrust at every critical touchpoint across the service blueprint.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Service Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn Reduction
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Delivery
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified enterprise service value proposition — reducing decision hesitation and confusion at tier selection across the membership journey.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency across all service touchpoints through service blueprinting, interaction redesign, and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led service activation as a first-class experience — removing friction at the most fragile conversion points.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced complexity for users advancing through entrepreneurial service tiers through behavioral UX and data-driven service blueprint refinement.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable service design framework aligned with long-term enterprise retention, growth, and business value generation.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative applies end-to-end service design lifecycle methodology — from opportunity identification and user research through service blueprinting, interaction design, and subscription-first enablement. The service experience is designed to guide first-time users from awareness through confident conversion and long-term retention. The result is a scalable service design foundation that reduces abandonment at critical moments and directly supports sustainable enterprise growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By applying rigorous service design methodology and aligning the membership journey with subscription-based engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile service conversion points. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence — an initiative that can support both revenue and long-term enterprise success.

modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end service design and interaction refactoring of a critical enterprise commerce experience facing revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining enterprise user trust and service flows that diverged significantly from modern standards positioned this as a strategic service recovery initiative — not a visual refresh. The service design challenge required aligning behavioral data, stakeholder priorities, and interaction principles to restore trust and drive measurable conversion outcomes.

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven service experience addressing enterprise user uncertainty at the most critical points of purchase decision.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive effort across service flows by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and friction through iterative service blueprint refinement.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class service action — integrated directly into the core enterprise commerce flow.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Achieved parity with modern enterprise service standards, closing the gap with high-performing industry benchmarks.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Growth in revenue, retention, and enterprise trust metrics through isolated, measurable service design improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring enterprise user trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the core service experience — including subscriptions, intelligent upsell pathways, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a service design-led roadmap that aligns every interaction decision with enterprise business outcomes and measurable KPIs.

modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the service design strategy and GenAI experience architecture for an enterprise-wide intelligent search initiative addressing a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results — forcing users to rely on external tools to find core services — directly undermining conversion, enterprise user confidence, and membership retention. The service design challenge required combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom GenAI API layer to restore trust and deliver intent-accurate results at scale.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: GenAI Search Intelligence
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: SERP Accuracy
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Enterprise Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Enterprise Kickoff
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore enterprise user trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results through GenAI-powered conversational search design.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by designing guided conversational AI responses when intent is unclear — replacing silent failure with intelligent service recovery.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate service paths to conversion through GenAI-informed product recommendations, agentic upsell logic, and intent-matched service suggestions.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and enterprise resources into a single, coherent conversational AI experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Position intelligent search as a strategic enterprise service layer — a GenAI-powered growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership retention, and business value.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core enterprise service layer — not a utility. By applying service design methodology and GenAI experience principles, the new system combines deterministic relevance logic with a custom conversational AI API layer — designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users through ambiguous service queries, and surface intent-matched recommendations that accelerate conversion and enterprise membership outcomes.
